functions.name: getConnectionString
functions.description: Gets the connection string for the specified resource.
functions.returns: The connection string for the specified resource.

functions.name: getEndpoint
functions.description: Gets the endpoint for the specified resource.
functions.returns: A URI representation of the endpoint.

parameters.name: endpointName
parameters.description: The optional endpoint name. If none are specified, the single defined endpoint is returned.

functions.name: getEndpointForNetworkExport
functions.description: Gets the endpoint for the specified resource in the specified network context.
functions.returns: A URI representation of the endpoint.
functions.signature: getEndpointForNetworkExport(resourceName: string, networkIdentifier?: string, endpointName?: string): uri

parameters.name: networkIdentifier
parameters.description: The optional network identifier string. If none is specified, the default network is used.

parameters.name: endpointName
parameters.description: The optional endpoint name. If none are specified, the single defined endpoint is returned.
